file.content:
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider  = "postgresql"
  url       = env("DATABASE_URL")
  directUrl = env("DIRECT_URL")
}

model User {
  id                Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
  email             String             @unique
  passwordHash      String
  name              String
  role              String             @default("chef") // admin, chef
  plan              String             @default("basic") // basic, pro, business
  stripeCustomerId  String?
  stripeSubId       String?
  emailVerified     Boolean            @default(true)
  verificationToken String?
  resetToken        String?
  resetTokenExpiry  DateTime?
  acceptedCguAt     DateTime?
  createdAt         DateTime           @default(now())
  ownedRestaurants  Restaurant[]       @relation("OwnedRestaurants")
  memberships       RestaurantMember[]

  @@map("users")
}

model ActivationCode {
  id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  code      String   @unique
  plan      String   // basic, pro, business
  used      Boolean  @default(false)
  usedBy    String?  // email of user who used it
  usedAt    DateTime?
  stripePaymentId String?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([code])
  @@map("activation_codes")
}

model Restaurant {
  id            Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
  name          String
  address       String?
  cuisineType   String?
  phone         String?
  coversPerDay  Int                @default(80)
  ownerId       Int
  owner         User               @relation("OwnedRestaurants", fields: [ownerId], references: [id])
  members       RestaurantMember[]
  ingredients   Ingredient[]
  recipes       Recipe[]
  suppliers     Supplier[]
  inventory     InventoryItem[]
  invoices      Invoice[]
  priceHistory  PriceHistory[]
  menuSales     MenuSale[]
  devis         Devis[]
  conversations    Conversation[]
  financialEntries FinancialEntry[]
  wasteLogs        WasteLog[]
  haccpTemperatures HaccpTemperature[]
  haccpCleanings   HaccpCleaning[]
  employees        Employee[]
  shifts           Shift[]
  seminaires       Seminaire[]
  marketplaceOrders MarketplaceOrder[]
  newsItems         NewsItem[]
  createdAt        DateTime           @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime           @updatedAt

  @@map("restaurants")
}

model RestaurantMember {
  id           Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  userId       Int
  restaurantId Int
  role         String     @default("member") // owner, admin, member
  user         User       @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([userId, restaurantId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([restaurantId])
  @@map("restaurant_members")
}

model Supplier {
  id           Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  name         String
  phone        String?
  email        String?
  address      String?
  city         String?
  postalCode   String?
  region       String?
  country      String     @default("France")
  siret        String?
  website      String?
  notes        String?
  categories   String[]
  contactName  String?
  delivery     Boolean    @default(true)
  minOrder      String?
  paymentTerms  String?
  whatsappPhone String?
  restaurantId  Int
  restaurant    Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt     DateTime   @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime   @updatedAt
  ingredients   Ingredient[]

  @@index([restaurantId])
  @@map("suppliers")
}

model Ingredient {
  id            Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
  name          String
  unit          String
  pricePerUnit  Float
  supplier      String?
  supplierId    Int?
  supplierRef   Supplier?          @relation(fields: [supplierId], references: [id])
  category      String
  allergens     String[]           @default([])
  restaurantId  Int
  restaurant    Restaurant         @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt     DateTime           @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime           @updatedAt
  recipes       RecipeIngredient[]
  inventoryItem InventoryItem?
  wasteLogs     WasteLog[]

  @@index([restaurantId, name])
  @@map("ingredients")
}

model Recipe {
  id               Int                @id @default(autoincrement())
  name             String
  category         String
  sellingPrice     Float
  nbPortions       Int                @default(1)
  description      String?
  prepTimeMinutes  Int?
  cookTimeMinutes  Int?
  laborCostPerHour Float              @default(0)
  restaurantId     Int
  restaurant       Restaurant         @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt        DateTime           @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime           @updatedAt
  ingredients      RecipeIngredient[]

  @@index([restaurantId, category])
  @@map("recipes")
}

model RecipeIngredient {
  id           Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  recipeId     Int
  ingredientId Int
  quantity     Float
  wastePercent Float      @default(0)
  recipe       Recipe     @relation(fields: [recipeId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  ingredient   Ingredient @relation(fields: [ingredientId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([recipeId, ingredientId])
  @@map("recipe_ingredients")
}

model InventoryItem {
  id                  Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  ingredientId        Int
  ingredient          Ingredient @relation(fields: [ingredientId], references: [id])
  currentStock        Float      @default(0)
  unit                String
  minStock            Float      @default(0)
  maxStock            Float?
  lastRestockDate     DateTime?
  lastRestockQuantity Float?
  notes               String?
  restaurantId        Int
  restaurant          Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt           DateTime   @default(now())
  updatedAt           DateTime   @updatedAt

  @@unique([ingredientId])
  @@index([restaurantId])
  @@map("inventory_items")
}

model Invoice {
  id            Int           @id @default(autoincrement())
  supplierName  String
  invoiceNumber String
  invoiceDate   String
  totalAmount   Float
  status        String        @default("pending")
  restaurantId  Int
  restaurant    Restaurant    @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt     DateTime      @default(now())
  items         InvoiceItem[]

  @@index([supplierName])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([restaurantId, createdAt])
  @@map("invoices")
}

model InvoiceItem {
  id           Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  invoiceId    Int
  invoice      Invoice  @relation(fields: [invoiceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  productName  String
  quantity     Float
  unit         String
  unitPrice    Float
  total        Float
  ingredientId Int?

  @@index([invoiceId])
  @@map("invoice_items")
}

model PriceHistory {
  id           Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  ingredientId Int
  price        Float
  date         String
  source       String     @default("manual")
  restaurantId Int
  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt    DateTime   @default(now())

  @@index([ingredientId])
  @@index([date])
  @@index([ingredientId, date])
  @@index([ingredientId, createdAt])
  @@map("price_history")
}

model MenuSale {
  id           Int        @id @default(autoincrement())

id           Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  recipeId     Int
  recipeName   String
  quantity     Int
  revenue      Float
  date         String
  restaurantId Int
  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt    DateTime   @default(now())

  @@index([recipeId])
  @@index([date])
  @@index([recipeId, date])
  @@map("menu_sales")
}

model Devis {
  id           Int         @id @default(autoincrement())
  number       String      // DEV-2026-001
  clientName   String
  clientEmail  String?
  clientPhone  String?
  clientAddress String?
  subject      String
  status       String      @default("draft") // draft, sent, accepted, rejected
  totalHT      Float       @default(0)
  totalTTC     Float       @default(0)
  tvaRate      Float       @default(20)
  validUntil   String?
  notes        String?
  restaurantId Int
  restaurant   Restaurant  @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  items        DevisItem[]
  createdAt    DateTime    @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime    @updatedAt

  @@index([restaurantId, status])
  @@map("devis")
}

model DevisItem {
  id          Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  devisId     Int
  devis       Devis  @relation(fields: [devisId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  description String
  quantity    Float
  unitPrice   Float
  total       Float

  @@index([devisId])
  @@map("devis_items")
}

model FinancialEntry {
  id           Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  date         String     // YYYY-MM-DD
  type         String     // revenue, expense
  category     String     // MatiÃ¨res premiÃ¨res, Personnel, Loyer, Ã‰nergie, etc.
  label        String     // Description
  amount       Float
  tvaRate      Float      @default(20)
  tvaAmount    Float      @default(0)
  paymentMode  String?    // CB, EspÃ¨ces, ChÃ¨que, Virement, Ticket resto
  reference    String?    // Invoice number, receipt number
  restaurantId Int
  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt    DateTime   @default(now())

  @@index([restaurantId, date])
  @@index([restaurantId, type])
  @@map("financial_entries")
}

model WasteLog {
  id           Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  ingredientId Int
  ingredient   Ingredient @relation(fields: [ingredientId], references: [id])
  quantity     Float
  unit         String
  reason       String     // expired, spoiled, overproduction, damaged, other
  costImpact   Float      // quantity * ingredient pricePerUnit
  date         String     // YYYY-MM-DD
  notes        String?
  restaurantId Int
  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt    DateTime   @default(now())

  @@index([restaurantId, date])
  @@map("waste_logs")
}

model Employee {
  id           Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  name         String
  role         String     // Chef, Commis, Serveur, Plongeur, Barman, Manager
  email        String?
  phone        String?
  hourlyRate   Float      @default(12)
  color        String     @default("#3b82f6")
  active       Boolean    @default(true)
  restaurantId Int
  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  shifts       Shift[]
  createdAt    DateTime   @default(now())

  @@index([restaurantId])
  @@map("employees")
}

model Shift {
  id           Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  employeeId   Int
  employee     Employee   @relation(fields: [employeeId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  date         String     // YYYY-MM-DD
  startTime    String     // HH:MM
  endTime      String     // HH:MM
  type         String     // Matin, Midi, Soir, Coupure
  notes        String?
  restaurantId Int
  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt    DateTime   @default(now())

  @@index([restaurantId, date])
  @@index([employeeId, date])
  @@map("shifts")
}

model HaccpTemperature {
  id           Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  zone         String     // Frigo, CongÃ©lateur, Plats chauds, RÃ©ception
  temperature  Float
  status       String     @default("conforme") // conforme, non_conforme, en_attente
  recordedBy   String?
  notes        String?
  date         String     // YYYY-MM-DD
  time         String?    // HH:MM
  restaurantId Int
  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt    DateTime   @default(now())

  @@index([restaurantId, date])
  @@map("haccp_temperatures")
}

model HaccpCleaning {
  id           Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  zone         String     // Cuisine, Salle, Toilettes, Chambre froide, etc.
  task         String     // Description of cleaning task
  status       String     @default("en_attente") // fait, en_attente, non_fait
  doneBy       String?
  date         String
  restaurantId Int
  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt    DateTime   @default(now())

  @@index([restaurantId, date])
  @@map("haccp_cleanings")
}

model Seminaire {
  id           Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  title        String
  clientName   String
  clientEmail  String?
  clientPhone  String?
  eventType    String     // SÃ©minaire, Mariage, Anniversaire, Corporate, Autre
  date         String     // YYYY-MM-DD
  startTime    String?
  endTime      String?
  guestCount   Int        @default(20)
  status       String     @default("demande") // demande, devis_envoye, confirme, en_cours, solde, annule
  budget       Float?
  menuDetails  String?
  equipment    String[]   @default([])
  notes        String?
  restaurantId Int
  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt    DateTime   @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime   @updatedAt

  @@index([restaurantId, status])
  @@index([restaurantId, date])
  @@map("seminaires")
}

model MarketplaceOrder {
  id           Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
  supplierName String
  status       String     @default("draft") // draft, sent, confirmed, received
  totalHT      Float      @default(0)
  notes        String?
  restaurantId Int
  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  items        MarketplaceOrderItem[]
  createdAt    DateTime   @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime   @updatedAt

  @@index([restaurantId, status])
  @@map("marketplace_orders")
}

model MarketplaceOrderItem {
  id          Int              @id @default(autoincrement())
  orderId     Int
  order       MarketplaceOrder @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  productName String
  quantity    Float
  unit        String
  unitPrice   Float
  total       Float

  @@index([orderId])
  @@map("marketplace_order_items")
}

model NewsItem {
  id            Int         @id @default(autoincrement())
  restaurantId  Int?        // null = news globale (tous restaurants)
  title         String
  content       String      @db.Text
  type          String      // price_alert | opportunity | trend | tip
  priority      String      @default("normal") // high | normal | low
  dismissed     Boolean     @default(false)
  mercurialeRef String?     // ex: "2026-03-30"
  createdAt     DateTime    @default(now())
  restaurant    Restaurant? @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([restaurantId, dismissed])
  @@map("news_items")
}

model Conversation {
  id           String     @id
  name         String
  participants String[]
  lastMessage  String     @default("")
  unreadCount  Int        @default(0)
  isGroup      Boolean    @default(false)
  avatar       String     @default("")
  restaurantId Int
  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt    DateTime   @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime   @updatedAt
  messages     Message[]

  @@map("conversations")
}

model Message {
  id             Int          @id @default(autoincrement())
  conversationId String
  conversation   Conversation @relation(fields: [conversationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  senderId       String
  senderName     String
  content        String
  timestamp      String
  read           Boolean      @default(false)
  createdAt      DateTime     @default(now())

  @@index([conversationId])
  @@map("messages")
}
